title: Is IShowSpeed working on a FIFA World Cup 2026 song? Behind-the-scenes footage sparks major fan speculation
summary_full: Behind-the-scenes footage has sparked speculation that IShowSpeed may be working on a FIFA World Cup 2026 song. Videos from a large-scale shoot in Miami showed the streamer surrounded by production crews, drones, flags, and football-themed visuals. Fans linked the project to the upcoming tournament, especially after Speed hinted at World Cup plans during a recent tour. The rumors have gained traction because his 2022 World Cup anthem became a viral hit, amassing more than 208 million views on YouTube.
